base_classifier: OpenCLIP openai text logits plus image-weighted normalized train prototype residual at scale 50
claim_boundary: external cross-dataset confirmation on CCT-20 unseen locations
class_mapping: canonical empty at internal index 0; animal classes sorted by normalized name
multi_label_policy: Exclude any image with more than one unique category_id before feature extraction and metrics; report counts only when that stage is opened.
prototype_weighting: image-weighted main; normalized image features before mean and normalized prototype after mean

stage_policy.cis_validation: engineering smoke and frozen-base verification only
stage_policy.trans_test: one-shot external confirmation after positive trans-validation receipt
stage_policy.trans_validation: one-location directional preflight; LESVI macro-F1 > STP and animal macro-F1 >= STP
